compiled_state.title: RED: Write inbound round-trip integration test (Jira Relates to local relates_to)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write an integration test that demonstrates the inbound round-trip: a Jira Relates link is synced inbound and appears as a local relates_to relationship. Uses mock Jira API.

## Test Approach
Given: Two local tickets with SYNC events. Mock Jira API returns a Relates link between PROJ-1 and PROJ-2.
When: Inbound sync is run (bridge-inbound processes the Jira link data)
Then: A local relates_to relationship exists between the two tickets

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test_bridge_inbound_integration.py (Edit: add inbound round-trip integration test)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Integration test for inbound round-trip exists
  Verify: grep -q "round_trip\|inbound.*link\|relates_to.*local" tests/scripts/test_bridge_inbound_integration.py
- [ ] Test passes (verifies existing inbound bridge link handling)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_inbound_integration.py -k "round_trip" --tb=short -q
